run the joint period of lords of 6 and 8, borrow money without any

The mutual exchange between lord of 12 and either lord of 8 or 6
will be advantageous to the person only when they happen to be
malefi<:s. Benefics by nature owning the 8 and 12 houses by mutually
ha\ring the interchange of places cannot do harm to the opponent and
also much good to the native, Because if lord of 6 Is a benefic and if it
occupies the second house or if lord 2 occupies the 6111 house. the
natives bani< position will improve by borrowing or by service. Therefore.
benefics ownilg the houses 8 and 12 mean that they own the houses
2 and 6 to the opponent. Therefore, benefics cannot bring either loss
or throw .any obstacles to the opponent. Hence the native cannot gain
much.
